projects.title: Finetuning Multimodal Large Language Model with Egocentric Video Data
projects.description: Finetuning Multimodal Large Language Model with egocentric video data to enhance its capability in understanding and reasoning about first-person visual information.

projects.title: Personal Egocentric Video Assitant
projects.description: Building a personal egocentric video assistant system, focusing on memory. It support memory construction, and memory retrieval for question answering.

projects.title: Finetuning Navigation World Model with New Datasets
projects.description: Finetuning Navigation World Model with new navigation datasets, evaluating and comparing its performance on familiar / half-familiar / unfamiliar scenes.

projects.title: Field-based Indoor Scene Optimization Methods
projects.description: We integrate multiple features such as "physical constraints" and "layout rationality" within indoor scenes to construct a "field" that guides object layout optimization.

projects.title: Semantics for Indoor Scene Layout and Dataset Augmentation
projects.description: Digital indoor scenes are complex data structures, and current datasets lack sufficient quantity and diversity to support the training of deep generative models. We aim to model semantics such as "object relationships" and "functional groups" in indoor scenes to expand the existing indoor scene datasets, enhancing their effectiveness in training deep generative models.

项目经历.标题: 使用第一视角视频数据微调多模态大语言模型
项目经历.描述: 使用第一视角视频数据微调多模态大语言模型，以增强其理解和推理第一人称视觉信息的能力。

项目经历.标题: 个人第一视角视频助手
项目经历.描述: 构建一个个人第一视角视频助手系统，重点关注记忆功能。该系统支持记忆构建和记忆检索以回答问题。

项目经历.标题: 使用新数据集微调导航世界模型
项目经历.描述: 使用SEKAI导航数据集对导航世界模型进行微调，评估并比较其在熟悉/半熟悉/不熟悉场景下的表现。

项目经历.标题: 基于场的室内场景优化方法
项目经历.描述: 我们将室内场景中的“物理约束”“布局合理性”等多种特征进行整合，构建一个指导物体布局优化的“场”。

项目经历.标题: 室内场景布局语义及数据集扩充
项目经历.描述: 数字化室内场景是复杂的数据结构，现有数据集在数量和多样性上均不足以支持深度生成模型的训练。我们旨在对室内场景中的“物体关系”“功能组”等语义进行建模，以扩充现有的室内场景数据集，提高其在深度生成模型训练中的有效性。
